dbPath.label: Database Path
dbPath.help: Path to the SQLite database file for the knowledge graph

autoExtract.label: Auto-Extract
autoExtract.help: Automatically extract entities and relations from conversations using LLM

autoRecall.label: Auto-Recall
autoRecall.help: Inject known entities into agent context before each request

recallMaxTokens.label: Recall Max Tokens
recallMaxTokens.help: Maximum tokens for L0 entity roster injection

recallMaxEntities.label: Recall Max Entities
recallMaxEntities.help: Maximum entities to include in L0 roster

searchMaxResults.label: Search Max Results
searchMaxResults.help: Default max results for memory_graph_search tool

recallAvailableBudget.label: Available Token Budget
recallAvailableBudget.help: Total token budget for memory context injection. 0 = use defaults. When set, L0/L1/L2 budgets are derived automatically.
